subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a new project using a planter or public repo

args.name: source
args.description: The name of a planter or a public repo

name: -f
--force
options.description: Force the created directory to overwrite an existing one

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a planter to your list

args.name: name
args.description: Name of the planter to use as a reference

name: -L
--local
options.description: Treat the location as a local repo instead of a remote repo

subcommands.name: edit
subcommands.description: Edit a planter in your list

args.name: name
args.description: Name of the planter to edit

name: -n
--name
options.description: Edit the name of a planter

name: -l
--location
options.description: Edit the location of a planter

name: -d
--delete
options.description: Remove a planter from your list

name: -f
--force
options.description: Edit something... dangerously. (Force the edit without any prompts.)

name: -R
--remote
options.description: Set the location type to remote

name: -L
--local
options.description: Set the location type to local

subcommands.name: pin
subcommands.description: Pins a planter to the top of your list

args.name: name
args.description: Name of the planter to pin

args.name: position
args.description: Specific position to set the planter at. (1 being the top of the list.)

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Prints all info about a planter in your list

args.name: name
args.description: Name of the planter to show info for
